representative_quotes: If your long term thesis hasn’t changed… Close your brokerage app. Go live your life.
I’m personally holding long term, since I haven’t seen a ~$1.4B company mapping to this many hyperscalers before.

Probably doesn’t have anything to do with individual fundamentals. Indiscriminate selloffs from things like cascading margin liquidations, usually provide compelling opportunities if the underlying improves.
